name: Greyon Table Lamp - 23 Inch Height - TBL4341 - Navy Blue - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Greyon 23 inch ceramic table lamp in a stunning navy blue finish. This elegant piece combines style and functionality, making it an excellent addition to any room. Crafted with care, the lamp features a ceramic body complemented by a sleek iron neck. It is designed to fit seamlessly into various decor styles, offering a touch of sophistication to your home. With a convenient E26 socket, the Greyon table lamp provides versatile lighting options to suit your needs. Its rich navy blue hue adds a pop of color while maintaining a classic appeal. Transform your living area or bedside with this chic lighting solution, blending artful design with everyday practicality.
